# Templates

## Workflow Page Template

```md
---
title: Workflow Name
slug: workflow-name
source: gstack
sourceSkill: skill-name
stage: Plan
specialist: Engineering Manager
type: workflow
tags:
  - planning
  - review
related:
  - review
  - qa
---

# Workflow Name

## Purpose

What this workflow helps accomplish.

## When To Use

Use this workflow when...

## Inputs

- Input 1
- Input 2

## Process

1. Step one.
2. Step two.
3. Step three.

## Outputs

- Output 1
- Output 2

## Checklist

- [ ] Done item
- [ ] Done item

## Related Workflows

- Related workflow
```

## Bug Report Template

# Bug Report

## Context

## Steps To Reproduce

## Expected

## Actual

## Evidence

## Suspected Area

## Fix Verification
